candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line at the top of the income statement; preferred over duplicate total line.

Duplicate total revenue line matching Revenue numerically; useful as fallback priority only.
Tax line, not revenue.

candidates.why: Tax/discontinued operations line, not revenue.
Discontinued operations result, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

candidates.why: Best direct production/service cost line; matches COGS/cost of sales concept.

variables.notes: Direct costs is the clear cost-of-sales equivalent.

candidates.why: Core overhead personnel cost line above operating loss; strong SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Items affecting comparability in personnel expenses
candidates.why: One-off comparability item within personnel; less preferred than the main personnel expense row.
Can be SG&A-related compensation, but may already be embedded in personnel expenses; risk of double counting.
Personnel subcomponent, but populated only some years and likely included in Personnel expenses.

candidates.row_label: Items affecting comparability in operating expenses
candidates.why: One-off comparability item, not a core recurring SG&A bucket.
Broad recurring overhead bucket above operating loss; good SG&A component.
SG&A-type subcomponent, but likely included within Other operating expenses and only populated in some years.
SG&A-type subcomponent, but likely included within Other operating expenses and only populated in some years.

candidates.row_label: Items affecting comparability in other operating expenses
candidates.why: One-off/non-recurring operating item, not preferred for recurring SG&A.
Headcount metric, not expense.
Headcount metric, not expense.

variables.notes: CR:nc|low. No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the best recurring overhead buckets and excluded one-off comparability items, D&A, impairments, and likely embedded subcomponents to avoid double counting.
No dedicated research and development line is visible on the income statement.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense on debt; strongest match for XINT.

candidates.why: Recurring financing cost on hybrid capital; should be included with interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost, but preview shows no visible values; acceptable as fallback if populated in source.
Equity/NCI line, not interest expense.
Equity/NCI line, not interest expense.
Balance sheet accrued liability, not the income statement expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Payable on Hybrid Capital Securities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring financing cost rows and excluded fair value/other finance items to avoid non-recurring valuation effects.

candidates.why: Income statement gain/loss line, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Share of net loss from associate accounted for using the equitymethod

Income attribution line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: (Loss)/profit for the year attributable to the equity holders of the parent company

Income attribution line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Profit for the period from continuing operations attributable to the equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement line, not equity.
Main balance sheet total equity line; valid BE choice when no parent-only equity line exists.
Duplicate total equity line; useful fallback for label variation.
Shareholder count, not equity.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners' equity line is shown, so total equity is used as BE. Because of this, MIB should remain empty to avoid double counting.
